description: Calculates a linear estimate for probability between two points (x0, y0) and (x1, y1).
Raises a ValueError if the segment defined by (x0, y0) and (x1, y1) is degenerate.
Clamps the calculated y value within the range of y0 and y1.
Does not clamp the calculated y value.
Clamps the calculated y value to the lower bound if it is less than the minimum of y0 and y1.
Clamps the calculated y value to the upper bound if it is greater than the maximum of y0 and y1.
